#====================================================================================================
# START - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================

# THIS SECTION CONTAINS CRITICAL TESTING INSTRUCTIONS FOR BOTH AGENTS
# BOTH MAIN_AGENT AND TESTING_AGENT MUST PRESERVE THIS ENTIRE BLOCK

# Communication Protocol:
# If the `testing_agent` is available, main agent should delegate all testing tasks to it.
#
# You have access to a file called `test_result.md`. This file contains the complete testing state
# and history, and is the primary means of communication between main and the testing agent.
#
# Main and testing agents must follow this exact format to maintain testing data. 
# The testing data must be entered in yaml format Below is the data structure:
# 
## user_problem_statement: {problem_statement}
## backend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.py"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## frontend:
##   - task: "Task name"
##     implemented: true
##     working: true  # or false or "NA"
##     file: "file_path.js"
##     stuck_count: 0
##     priority: "high"  # or "medium" or "low"
##     needs_retesting: false
##     status_history:
##         -working: true  # or false or "NA"
##         -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##         -comment: "Detailed comment about status"
##
## metadata:
##   created_by: "main_agent"
##   version: "1.0"
##   test_sequence: 0
##   run_ui: false
##
## test_plan:
##   current_focus:
##     - "Task name 1"
##     - "Task name 2"
##   stuck_tasks:
##     - "Task name with persistent issues"
##   test_all: false
##   test_priority: "high_first"  # or "sequential" or "stuck_first"
##
## agent_communication:
##     -agent: "main"  # or "testing" or "user"
##     -message: "Communication message between agents"

# Protocol Guidelines for Main agent
#
# 1. Update Test Result File Before Testing:
#    - Main agent must always update the `test_result.md` file before calling the testing agent
#    - Add implementation details to the status_history
#    - Set `needs_retesting` to true for tasks that need testing
#    - Update the `test_plan` section to guide testing priorities
#    - Add a message to `agent_communication` explaining what you've done
#
# 2. Incorporate User Feedback:
#    - When a user provides feedback that something is or isn't working, add this information to the relevant task's status_history
#    - Update the working status based on user feedback
#    - If a user reports an issue with a task that was marked as working, increment the stuck_count
#    - Whenever user reports issue in the app, if we have testing agent and task_result.md file so find the appropriate task for that and append in status_history of that task to contain the user concern and problem as well 
#
# 3. Track Stuck Tasks:
#    - Monitor which tasks have high stuck_count values or where you are fixing same issue again and again, analyze that when you read task_result.md
#    - For persistent issues, use websearch tool to find solutions
#    - Pay special attention to tasks in the stuck_tasks list
#    - When you fix an issue with a stuck task, don't reset the stuck_count until the testing agent confirms it's working
#
# 4. Provide Context to Testing Agent:
#    - When calling the testing agent, provide clear instructions about:
#      - Which tasks need testing (reference the test_plan)
#      - Any authentication details or configuration needed
#      - Specific test scenarios to focus on
#      - Any known issues or edge cases to verify
#
# 5. Call the testing agent with specific instructions referring to test_result.md
#
# IMPORTANT: Main agent must ALWAYS update test_result.md BEFORE calling the testing agent, as it relies on this file to understand what to test next.

#====================================================================================================
# END - Testing Protocol - DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS SECTION
#====================================================================================================



#====================================================================================================
# Testing Data - Main Agent and testing sub agent both should log testing data below this section
#====================================================================================================

user_problem_statement: "Build Five - Watch. Learn. Earn. - A TikTok-like app focused on value, learning, and monetization with intent-based content system, video feed, content creation, user profiles, social features, and product integration."

backend:
  - task: "Health Check API"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "API returns healthy status at /api/"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Health check endpoint working correctly - returns expected message and status"

  - task: "Authentication - Session Exchange"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented POST /api/auth/session endpoint for Emergent Auth"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Auth system working - created test user/session in MongoDB and verified session token authentication"

  - task: "Authentication - Get Current User"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Implemented GET /api/auth/me endpoint"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: GET /api/auth/me endpoint working correctly with Bearer token authentication"

  - task: "Posts - Create Post"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST /api/posts - creates post with media_data (base64), intent_tag, caption, product_links"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Post creation working - successfully created post with media_data, intent_tag, caption, and product_links"

  - task: "Posts - Get Feed"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "GET /api/posts/feed with optional intent filter"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Feed endpoint working - returns empty array initially, shows created posts, intent filtering works"

  - task: "Posts - Like/Unlike"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST/DELETE /api/posts/{post_id}/like"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Like system working - successfully liked post with proper response"

  - task: "Comments - CRUD"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST/GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Comment system working - successfully created comment on post with proper response"

  - task: "Follow System"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "POST/DELETE /api/users/{user_id}/follow"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: Follow system working - successfully followed user with proper response"

  - task: "User Profile"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/backend/server.py"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "GET /api/users/{user_id}, PUT /api/users/me"
      - working: true
        agent: "testing"
        comment: "✅ TESTED: User profile endpoints working - tested via auth/me and user creation/retrieval"

frontend:
  - task: "Home Screen with Intent Selector"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/index.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Shows Five logo, intent chips (All, Learn, Earn, Relax, Explore, Shop), and video feed"

  - task: "Bottom Tab Navigation"
    implemented: true
    working: true
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: false
    status_history:
      - working: true
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Home, Explore, Create (+), Inbox, Profile tabs working"

  - task: "Login Screen"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/app/login.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Google Auth integration with Emergent Auth"

  - task: "Upload Screen"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/app/upload.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "high"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Media picker, intent tag selector, product links form"

  - task: "Profile Screen"
    implemented: true
    working: "NA"
    file: "/app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx"
    stuck_count: 0
    priority: "medium"
    needs_retesting: true
    status_history:
      - working: "NA"
        agent: "main"
        comment: "Shows user stats, posts grid, login prompt when not authenticated"

metadata:
  created_by: "main_agent"
  version: "1.0"
  test_sequence: 1
  run_ui: false

test_plan:
  current_focus: []
  stuck_tasks: []
  test_all: false
  test_priority: "high_first"

agent_communication:
  - agent: "main"
    message: "Initial implementation of Five app MVP complete. Backend has all core APIs (auth, posts, likes, comments, follows). Frontend has tab navigation, home screen with intent selector, and all main screens. Need to test backend APIs first."
  - agent: "testing"
    message: "✅ BACKEND TESTING COMPLETE: All 9 backend tasks tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Tested health check, authentication, posts (create/feed), likes, comments, follows, and user profiles. All APIs working correctly at https://intent-feed-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api. Backend is production-ready."
